global_description: A medium-sized bird with a slender, streamlined body and a long tail. It features a bright yellow underbelly and a contrasting gray head and back. The wings are broad and dark with lighter edges, and the beak is short and pointed.
discriminative_attributes: Broad dark wings with light edges

part_details.head: Smooth, rounded, gray with a slight crest.
part_details.wings: Broad, dark with lighter feather edges.
part_details.tail: Long, dark, slightly forked at the tip.

spatial_relations: The gray head transitions smoothly into the yellow underbelly.
The broad wings extend from the sides of the body.
The long tail extends straight from the rear.
